summary: User asks composer to process inline message rows, run each through Azure content safety with a threshold, and aggregate approved rows into a single output. Exercises both the content-safety transform's options block and a batch-aggregation transform's trigger config. Re-authored 2026-05-07 (Tier 1.5 final hardening) using inline content — the original prompt referenced /tmp paths which the composer correctly refuses (Trust Tier 3 boundary). The workspace input contract requires create_blob + set_source_from_blob (skill Pattern 1b) or inline_blob in set_pipeline. NOTE: requires Azure content-safety credentials on the deploy; if absent the scenario will RED on environment, not on composer logic.
opening_prompt:
Please create a pipeline that processes the following messages, runs each through Azure content safety, drops any message whose hate or violence severity is at or above 4, and writes the approved messages as a JSON output at outputs/approved.json. Messages (CSV with one column 'text'):
text
The weather is lovely today.
Looking forward to next week's review meeting.
Have a great afternoon!
Thank you for the thoughtful update.
Project milestones are on track.

build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.build_failure_note: Server-injected on completion-claim with failed preflight.

green_criteria.must_have_node_kinds_substring_any_of_no: Content-safety transform must be wired in. The aggregation/threshold piece may be expressed via gate + threshold or aggregation transform; we don't pin the specific shape — only that the safety check fired.
